response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, matching a key required skill. His work with Vitest-equivalent testing (TDD, CI/CD, custom test runners) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) aligns well. He has deep backend/frontend expertise across multiple stacks, including PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB, and has led architecture decisions in distributed systems. His open-source contributions and workshops demonstrate strong communication, documentation, and process improvement skills. Minor gaps: no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest (though he uses equivalent tools), and limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles — though he has used them historically. German language is basic, but role is in Berlin and English is fluent. His education (CS degree) satisfies the requirement.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows (MCP code generators)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling with open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in recent roles (though equivalents used)
Kotlin/Java experience is historical and not recent; may need ramp-up
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting local collaboration
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with extensive full-stack experience, direct AI-agent work, and strong architectural and testing practices. His use of equivalent technologies to Nest.js and Vitest, combined with proven ability to adapt tools, mitigates the stack gaps. His open-source leadership and process improvement history make him a high-impact individual contributor. The minor language and framework mismatches are outweighed by his depth and adaptability.
